name: Fuerte Metals Corp.
description: Fuerte Metals Corp. is a Canadian junior mineral exploration company focused on the acquisition, exploration, and development of high-grade copper and gold properties in the Americas. The company's flagship project is the Copper Creek Project, located in Arizona, USA, which is a large-scale porphyry copper-molybdenum deposit. Fuerte Metals is committed to creating shareholder value through systematic exploration and development of its mineral assets while maintaining high environmental and social standards.
